highItems.full: EIDR backfill Phase 1b — populate parent_keys.eidr_id column. agents/eidr-agent.js + creds already exist. Bulk loop over 589,814 matched IMDB tconsts resolving to EIDR IDs. Rate-limit (EIDR API throttles; target ≤5 rps). Output: new `parent_keys/v1b/YYYY-MM-DD/movies.parquet` with eidr_id column populated where match found. Match-rate baseline TBD (likely 60–85% for studio-released films). Skip TMDB fallback keys (tmdb_mov_*) as EIDR has no TMDB join surface.

highItems.full: Batch similar tasks in build loop — refactor sasmaster-build.sh to group related tasks into single Claude Code sessions instead of one session per task. Specifically: agent-wiring tasks should run as one session, data pipeline tasks as one session. Reduces CLAUDE_MEMORY.md + TASKS.md context reload overhead per task. Document batching logic in runbook. #infra *Sent using* Claude

highItems.text: Harden build loop against API timeouts — add retry logic (3 attempts, exponential backoff) to all Claude API calls in sa…
highItems.full: Harden build loop against API timeouts — add retry logic (3 attempts, exponential backoff) to all Claude API calls in sasmaster-build.sh and runner.py. Add timeout detection: if a task exceeds 10min with no token output, kill + requeue. Post timeout events to #sasmaster-builds with task name + duration. Log to logs/timeout-log.jsonl. This is P0 before any heavy build cycles. #infra *Sent using* Claude

highItems.text: Intelligent build loop sequencing — refactor sasmaster-build.sh to execute tasks in dependency order, not just top-to-bo…
highItems.full: Intelligent build loop sequencing — refactor sasmaster-build.sh to execute tasks in dependency order, not just top-to-bottom. Priority sequence: (1) #infra tasks first — timeout hardening, token optimization, batching logic must complete before data tasks run. (2) #data tasks second. (3) #ui tasks last. Add a pre-flight check: if timeout hardening and cost-log are not confirmed live, hold all heavy #data tasks and post a warning to #sasmaster-builds. This is the gate before any heavy build cycles. #infra *Sent using* Claude

medItems.full: War Room Visual Export — upgrade to server-side screenshot via /api/screenshot.js Vercel serverless function using @sparticuz/chromium + puppeteer-core. Current client-side window.open approach works but briefly flashes a popup. Server-side gives silent, pixel-perfect PNG capture. Requires: add @sparticuz/chromium + puppeteer-core to sasmaster-status package.json, create api/screenshot.js, update downloadVisual() in index.html to POST  to /api/screenshot and receive PNG blob. QA check: downloaded PNG > 100KB, background dark, no white/blank output. #infra

Requires: add @sparticuz/chromium + puppeteer-core to sasmaster-status package.json, create api/screenshot.js, update downloadVisual() in index.html to POST  to /api/screenshot and receive PNG blob. QA check: downloaded PNG > 100KB, background dark, no white/blank output. #infra
